hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(js|jsx)$' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Source file edited — remember to run tests before committing."}}' || true; }
echo '{"systemMessage":"Before compacting: preserve current git branch, test status, todo list state, and any in-progress file edits in the compacted summary."}'
cd /home/user/watch-advisor2 && STATUS=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | head -5); if [ -n "$STATUS" ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Uncommitted changes detected:\n$STATUS\"}"; fi
cd /home/user/watch-advisor2 && [ -d node_modules ] || PUPPETEER_SKIP_DOWNLOAD=1 npm install --silent 2>&1 | tail -3

PAT=$(curl -sf -H 'x-api-secret: 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' https://watch-advisor2.netlify.app/.netlify/functions/github-pat | python3 -c 'import sys,json;print(json.load(sys.stdin)["pat"])' 2>/dev/null) && cd /home/user/watch-advisor2 && git remote set-url origin https://x-access-token:${PAT}@github.com/Eiasash/watch-advisor2.git && echo '{"systemMessage":"GitHub PAT configured — push enabled."}' || echo '{"systemMessage":"GitHub PAT fetch failed — push will require manual auth."}'
